feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: Buy England vs. Norway quarterfinals tickets: See the latest prices and seats for FIFA World Cup match
entry.content: England and Norway are quarterfinals-bound at the World Cup. Here's everything to know about the matchup in Miami with ticketing and start time information.

entry.title: What Folarin Balogun said to Belgium’s head coach as USMNT exit World Cup
entry.content: Folarin Balogun has found his name in the headlines over the last 48 hours as the USMNT have now crashed out of the World Cup. There was plenty of controversy leading up to the game in Seattle on Monday following Balogun’s suspension being overturned by FIFA.

entry.title: Real Madrid’s stance emerges on new goalkeeper signing
entry.content: Real Madrid have already started planning for the future between the posts, even though signing a new goalkeeper is not currently considered a priority.According to Mundo Deportivo, the club continues...

entry.title: Dalton Rushing delivers walk-off hit as Dodgers beat Rockies in extras
entry.content: LOS ANGELES — Dalton Rushing didn't need to say much after the game.

entry.title: UFC Shanghai reportedly adds flyweight bout for return to China
entry.content: The Ultimate Fighting Championship’s return to China is scheduled for Aug. 29 at the Shanghai Indoor Stadium and a new flyweight matchup has reportedly been added to the card.

entry.title: Buy France vs. Morocco quarterfinals tickets: See the latest prices and seats for FIFA World Cup match
entry.content: France and Morocco will get a rematch at the World Cup when they face off in the quarterfinals. Here's what to know about tickets to the match in Boston.

entry.title: Newcastle told to pay £51m for Freiburg ace Johan Manzambi
entry.content: Newcastle United have come alive in the transfer market this summer and are stepping up efforts to revamp Eddie Howe’s squad.According to Sky reporter Florian Plettenberg, the Magpies have now turne...

entry.title: Roma insist on monetizing from Dovbyk’s sale
entry.content: Artem Dovbyk is expected to leave Roma. The Ukrainian striker isn’t part of Gian Piero Gasperini’s coaching plan, although he will likely attend the training camp scheduled for July 13th at Trigor...

entry.title: Barcelona forward responds to criticism with game-changing cameo for Spain in Portugal win: ‘In tournaments like this…’
entry.content: Barcelona forward Ferran Torres delivered an important response to his critics after helping Spain secure a 1-0 victory over Portugal and advance to the quarter-finals of the FIFA World Cup 2026.It mu...

entry.title: Floyd Mayweather sends retirement support to ‘brother’ Cristiano Ronaldo after World Cup exit
entry.content: Cristiano Ronaldo’s exit from the 2026 FIFA World Cup has sent shockwaves through social media. The 41-year-old has possibly played his final game in a Portugal jersey at the World Cup following his team’s 1-0 defeat at the hands of Spain.

entry.title: Raptors urged to bring another former star back to pair with Kawhi Leonard
entry.content: The Toronto Raptors made a bold move to reacquire Kawhi Leonard this offseason, so why not reacquire another former star as well?

entry.title: Five charged in Liberia after more than 200kg of cocaine seized in drug bust
entry.content: Shipment discovered at airport in Monrovia and valued at £14.2m had been falsely declared as seasoning cubesAuthorities in Liberia have charged five suspects over one of the largest drug seizures in the country’s history, after police found more than 200kg of cocaine falsely declared as Maggi seasoning cubes.The shipment, with an estimated value of $19m (£14.2m), was discovered at the international airport in Monrovia on 8 June, but the suspects were not named until a press briefing at the weekend. Continue reading...

entry.title: Where to watch Argentina vs. Egypt live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Round of 16 match
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Argentina vs. Egypt World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: Switzerland vs. Colombia projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup Round of 16 game in Vancouver
entry.content: Switzerland and Colombia battle for a place in the World Cup quarterfinals. Here's the latest team news, predicted lineups and where to watch for the Round of 16 showdown in Vancouver.

entry.title: Where to watch Wings vs. Liberty today: Channel, time, TV schedule, live stream for Tuesday WNBA game
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about Wings vs. Liberty, including TV channel and streaming options for the WNBA matchup.

entry.title: USA vs. Belgium history: Head-to-head matches at World Cup, last meeting, team records and more
entry.content: Here's a quick look through the history between the twio nations, which are set to meet again on Monday.

entry.title: People keep asking me why I’m choosing to have a caesarean – here are my reasons | Sharon Gaffka
entry.content: This isn’t an argument against vaginal birth, and caesareans aren’t without risk. But in the context of failing maternity services, it gives me the greatest sense of calmSharon Gaffka is a reality TV star and political activistOne thing nobody really prepares you for when you’re pregnant is how interested everyone suddenly becomes in your body. People ask if you’re planning on breastfeeding. Whether you’ll have an epidural. If you’re hoping for a water birth. Whether you’ll “try naturally”.I’ve chosen to have a caesarean, and now that I’m getting closer to my due date, the question I get asked most is: “why?” The answer is because I want to.Sharon Gaffka is a reality TV star and political activistDo you have an opinion on the issues raised in this article? If you would like to submit a response of up to 300 words by email to be considered for publication in our letters section, please click here. Continue reading...

entry.title: June heatwave in UK led to ‘mass sleep deprivation’, poll suggests
entry.content: Exclusive: Record temperatures fuelled by climate crisis left 86% of homes ‘too hot’ and many people feeling unwellWith parts of England once again in the grip of a heatwave, an opinion poll shows the one at the end of June led to “mass sleep deprivation”, with two in three people struggling to sleep during the sweltering nights.Almost half of people said they had lost at least three hours of sleep each night. The results are consistent with scientific research showing that global heating is damaging sleep across the world. Continue reading...

entry.title: Argentina vs. Egypt projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup Round of 16 game in Atlanta
entry.content: Argentina and Egypt battle for a place in the World Cup quarterfinals. Here's the latest team news, predicted lineups and where to watch for the Round of 16 showdown in Atlanta.

entry.title: Rapid endometriosis tests to be made available on NHS in England and Wales
entry.content: Saliva and gut sensor-based tests hailed as ‘gamechanger’ for millions of women who can wait years for diagnosisTwo tests that can dramatically speed up diagnosis of endometriosis are to be made available on the NHS in England and Wales, in a move hailed as a “gamechanger” for millions of women.One in 10 women of reproductive age are affected by the condition, where tissue similar to that found in the womb lining grows elsewhere, such as the ovaries and fallopian tubes. Symptoms include painful periods, painful bowel movements, pain when urinating and pain during or after sex. Continue reading...

entry.title: Belgium Claps Back On Folarin Balogun Red Card Fiasco After Big World Cup Win Over USA
entry.content: The victorious Belgium team mainly let their skills do the talking at the World Cup after a day of red card suspension controversy, a failed appeal, and the unsurprising intervention of Donald Trump. For some, the 4-1 win Monday over a demolished Christian Pulisic and Team USA in Seattle, WA would have said it all. …

entry.title: Christian Pulisic in tears after latest injury in USA’s World Cup exit
entry.content: Pulisic saw his and the USA’s World Cup end back under the cloud of injury

entry.title: New Buck Jaime Jaquez Jr. has familiar words for Milwaukee fans
entry.content: In his farewell message to Miami Heat followers, Jaimie Jaquez Jr. included a familiar Bucks refrain to his new fan base.

entry.title: Brad Stevens says Jaylen Brown trade was about Celtics’ salary cap and future flexibility
entry.content: Celtics president of basketball operations Brad Stevens and team owner Bill Chisholm want to make one thing clear: The decision to trade perennial All-Star Jaylen Brown wasn’t arrived at lightly.

entry.title: Belgium beats US 4-1 to reach World Cup quarterfinals, taking advantage of defensive lapses
entry.content: The United States’ hopes for a deep World Cup run at home ended when Charles De Ketelaere scored twice and assisted on another goal, helping Belgium expose the Americans’ defensive liabilities in a 4-1 win Monday night that earned a quarterfinal berth.

entry.title: The GOAT? Jon Jones picks Ronaldo over Messi because of their Instagram DMs
entry.content: Jon Jones didn’t have difficulty choosing between two of the greatest soccer players of all time.

entry.title: Belgium thrash USA to end World Cup dream and set up Spain showdown
entry.content: Fired-up Belgium brought the United States' World Cup party to a shuddering halt on Monday, thrashing the tournament co-hosts 4-1 to set up a quarter-final showdown with Spain.Instead, a rampant Belgium ruthlessly dismantled the USA's hopes of reaching a first World Cup quarter-final in 24 years, in a bitterly disappointing end to a campaign that had captivated the host nation.

entry.title: How old will Christian Pulisic, Folarin Balogun, other USMNT stars be in 2030 World Cup?
entry.content: Here's a look at how old the USMNT's best players will be when the 2030 Wolrd Cup fianlly rolls around.

entry.title: Chinese Nuclear Submarine Test-Launches Long-Range Missile
entry.content: Some countries in the region were quick to criticize the launch, which China sought to play down.

entry.title: There’s a New Way of War, but Is It Evolution or Revolution?
entry.content: Militaries worldwide are grappling with breakneck technological change and the lessons from Ukraine and the Persian Gulf.

entry.title: These Workers Tell Us How They Do Their Jobs in 116-Degree Heat
entry.content: India regularly experiences the type of blazing weather the U.S. has faced this summer. “It feels like you are burning but you are still alive.”

entry.title: IRGC Fires Missiles at Ships in Strait of Hormuz
entry.content: The attacks could complicate negotiations to end the U.S. war with Iran.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
In dreams and in love there are no impossibilities.
Lucky Numbers: 10, 87, 13, 95, 84, 81

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: When taking a picture, squint your eyes to make your smile look more genuine.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: A Boeing 747s wingspan is longer than the Wright brother's first flight.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Sun Tzu
entry.content: “It is easy to love your friend, but sometimes the hardest lesson to learn is to love your enemy.” — Sun Tzu

entry.title: JPMorgan, Bank of America and Other Banks Explore a Deal to Shake Up Payments World
entry.content: A deal for a card network could allow bigger transaction fees, but some bank executives are worried about backlash.

entry.title: Canada Rushes to Build Up Its Military as U.S. Relationship Frays
entry.content: The country has long lagged behind NATO allies in defense spending, but Prime Minister Mark Carney says it has to do more.

entry.title: The 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule and how to watch
entry.content: With 104 World Cup games being played in the U.S., Canada and Mexico, it's like "a Super Bowl every single day for five weeks," U.S. team captain Tim Ream told CBS News.

entry.title: Graham Platner Reassesses ‘Best Path Forward’ in Senate Bid After Sexual-Assault Claim
entry.content: Plus, Trump confirms he called FIFA’s president about U.S. player, and saying ‘I do’ can means cats, too.

entry.title: State of emergency declared in West Virginia amid warehouse fire
entry.content: A massive warehouse fire in Parkersburg has forced West Virginia to declare a state of emergency as burning plastics threaten air quality for thousands. The fire continues to burn with containment efforts underway. CBS News' Shanelle Kaul reports.

entry.title: Judge says alleged D.C. pipe bomber isn't covered by Trump's Jan. 6 pardons
entry.content: A judge ruled that that President Trump's pardons of the rioters were "expressly limited" to those who were convicted of their actions on Jan. 6, 2021, and did not apply to Brian Cole Jr.

entry.title: Extended interview: USMNT player Chris Richards on Balogun red card, World Cup popularity, more
entry.content: USMNT player Chris Richards speaks with Tony Dokoupil about how the team reacted when they found out Folarin Balogun could play against Belgium, what he thinks of the World Cup's popularity in the U.S. and more.

entry.title: SK Hynix’s Planned $28 Billion Offering Brings Korean Market Fever to the U.S.
entry.content: The listing will make it easier to invest in one of the world’s biggest chip companies. The sector helped the Nasdaq composite rise 1.1%.

entry.title: Platner says he's reflecting on "best path forward" amid sexual assault allegation
entry.content: A Maine woman told Politico that Graham Platner entered her home in late 2021 and forced himself on her. Platner denies the allegation.

entry.title: FIFA criticized for lifting U.S. star's red card suspension after Trump phone call
entry.content: Europe's soccer governing body and prominent commentators have criticized the decision, which allows Folarin Balogun to play against Belgium.

entry.title: Woman who dated Graham Platner claims he forced her to have sex against her will, Politico reports
entry.content: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner is facing another accusation. Politico reports that a woman Platner dated nearly five years ago claims he forced her to have sex with him against her will.

entry.title: Tech Stocks Go From Red to Green
entry.content: Plus, another SpaceX landing and Strategy’s math problem.

entry.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
entry.content: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

entry.title: Supreme Court won't block Texas from enforcing a law requiring age verification for app downloads
entry.content: Supreme Court won't block Texas from enforcing a law requiring age verification for app downloads

entry.title: ‘Living like this is agony’: Cuba suffers third nationwide blackout in six months
entry.content: Impoverished island was already struggling to keep the lights on before the US imposed a blockade in JanuaryCuba on Monday suffered its third nationwide power outage since the start of the year, the state electricity company said.The impoverished island was already struggling to keep the lights on before the US president, Donald Trump, imposed an oil blockade in January, which has depleted the already dwindling supply of fuel for Cuba’s power plants. Continue reading...

entry.title: Who could play a sour, unemployed, self-deprecating version of John Slattery? He had a surprising answer
entry.content: The 'Mad Men' star reflects on playing a washed-up version of himself, the fickleness of Hollywood and why broad comedy is harder than it looks.

entry.title: Lionel Richie 'doing well' after hitting pause on tour for unspecified health issue
entry.content: Lionel Richie seems to be moving past the unspecified health issue that prompted him to postpone a pair of shows on his summer tour with Earth, Wind & Fire. 'I'm doing well,' he says.

entry.title: Portugal vs. Spain live score, result, highlights from 2026 World Cup knockout game
entry.content: The Sporting News is tracking live scoring updates and highlights for Portugal vs. Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow for complete results from the Round of 16 match in Dallas.

entry.title: Where to watch Portugal vs. Spain live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Round of 16 match
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Portugal vs. Spain World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
entry.content: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

entry.title: Portugal vs. Spain free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable
entry.content: Cristiano Ronaldo and Lamine Yamal collide in the World Cup Round of 16 with a place in the quarterfinal on the line for Portugal or Spain.

entry.title: World Cup Round of 16 bracket: Updated schedule, results for second 2026 FIFA knockout round
entry.content: Here's a look at the Round of 16 bracket for the 2026 World Cup, with full schedule and results.

entry.title: World Cup bracket 2026: Live updated FIFA knockout stages and printable version for download
entry.content: Download The Sporting News’ printable 2026 World Cup bracket, including expert tips and predictions to help pick every game in the Round of 16 and quarterfinals.

entry.title: Why Phillies' top trade deadline need might not be a righty-hitting outfielder
entry.content: The Phillies' top trade deadline need is an underrated one.

entry.title: Celtics officially cut ties with disgruntled $285 million star via lopsided trade to 76ers
entry.content: The Boston Celtics completed a blockbuster trade on Monday.

entry.title: Royals expected to gauge trade market for all-star Michael Wacha
entry.content: Fresh off his first All-Star selection since 2015, Royals veteran Michael Wacha has reestablished himself as one of baseball’s most dependable starters. With Kansas City falling out of the playoff race, his durability, postseason experience and team-friendly contract could make him one of the most coveted pitchers available before the MLB trade deadline.

entry.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
entry.content: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

entry.title: Comcast's Sky to buy Britain's ITV in $2.1 billion deal
entry.content: The move comes a week after Comcast announced it would peel off its NBCUniversal and Sky units, creating a new public company

entry.title: Iran war accelerates the race for mobile military data centers
entry.content: The military is using ruggedized mobile data centers in extreme environments around the world, and some of the nation's top defense companies are competing to provide them.

entry.title: Xbox cuts 3,200 jobs as gaming business struggles
entry.content: As Microsoft continues to invest majorly into AI, it's gaming division, Xbox, is making major cuts to its workforce and selling several of its studios.

entry.title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo e-reader support will happen this year after all
entry.content: Bookship.org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms and is working on integration.

entry.title: AI actor Tilly Norwood to star in first movie
entry.content: AI actor Tilly Norwood will star in her first movie, a comedy drama called 'Misaligned.'

entry.title: The Hollywood Bowl just got its biggest sound upgrade in a generation. AI is doing the heavy lifting
entry.content: A new speaker array, an immersive surround system and machine-learning vocal isolation technology are transforming the experience at one of the world's most beloved concert venues.

entry.title: Bitcoin rebounds after Trump says he's become 'a big crypto guy'
entry.content: Earlier, bitcoin fell toward $60,000 after Strategy disclosed the sale of more of its holdings of the token.

entry.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
entry.content: PSA: A change to Google's privacy settings let it train its AI on more of your data. Here's how to opt out.

entry.title: How the Cleveland Cavaliers appear inevitable as LeBron James' free agent landing spot
entry.content: Other teams, like the 76ers and Warriors, might be getting the sense for what's really happening here.

entry.title: Shedeur Sanders could thrive in Todd Monken's offense despite lacking Lamar Jackson's legs
entry.content: Todd Monken's offense once ran on elite legs, but a Cleveland Browns beat writer thinks the quarterback lacking them could still thrive.

entry.title: Red Wings' Dylan Larkin trade plans changed after offer sheet news
entry.content: The salary implications here are huge.

entry.title: Balogun's red card suspension lifted after Trump called FIFA chief
entry.content: Balogun's reinstatement came after President Trump called FIFA President Gianni Infantino last week and asked for a review of the red card suspension.

entry.title: Japanese forward Hachimura signs with Clippers: reports
entry.content: Japanese forward Rui Hachimura has agreed to a two-year NBA free agency deal worth $28 million with the Los Angeles Clippers, according to multiple reports on Monday.The 28-year-old playmaker made the deal, according to The Athletic and ESPN, hours ahead of the NBA period opening to allow teams to sign free agents for the 2026-27 campaign.

entry.title: Pac-12 adds seven schools for 2026 football season
entry.content: The Pac-12 is rebuilding with seven new schools joining Oregon State and Washington State for the 2026 season.

entry.title: Braves officially call up Owen Murphy, DFA Carlos Carrasco, recall JR Ritchie and place Martín Pérez on IL
entry.content: Last night, we reported that Owen Murphy would be the next big prospect call-up for the Atlanta Braves. This was after the news came out that Martín Pérez would likely be heading to the IL due to the injury that he suffered after getting hit with a comebacker during Sunday’s loss to the Mets. We […]

entry.title: How Lady Vols basketball, softball orange Adidas jerseys are nod to past
entry.content: The new orange Adidas jerseys for Lady Vols basketball and softball both include Summitt Blue, which is a nod to past Tennessee Adidas uniforms.

entry.title: Bills make big announcement for new Highmark Stadium
entry.content: The Bills are doing something additional at their new stadium.

entry.title: PFF names three Rebels in their 2026 Top 50 rankings
entry.content: Pro Football Focus is a highly respected and widely recognized analytics organization that is often used in both sports media and NFL front offices. That just means, what they put out, should be heard out. They recently released their top 50 rankings heading into the 2026 college football season and three Ole Miss Rebels made […]

entry.title: FIFA criticized for lifting U.S. star's red card suspension after Trump phone call
entry.content: Europe's soccer governing body and prominent commentators have criticized the decision, which allows Folarin Balogun to play against Belgium.

entry.content: The latest team news ahead of a huge World Cup Round of 16 game — and perhaps Cristiano Ronaldo's last.

entry.title: Why France is appealing Michael Olise yellow card to FIFA after Folarin Balogun decision
entry.content: It's turning into the World Cup of appeals.

entry.title: Kate Martin's contract update is big news for Caitlin Clark's former teammate
entry.content: Martin has earned this.

entry.title: Andrey Santos: Chelsea star’s thoughts on Man United move revealed
entry.content: After a rampant start to the summer transfer window, Manchester United’s midfield rebuild has begun to show signs of uncertainty. A £39 million agreement for Ederson was struck at the beginning of ...

entry.title: New York Giants fans share injury concerns after Jaxson Dart footage shared
entry.content: New York Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart is concerning a number of fans following his recent fourth of July celebrations. The Giants finished bottom of the NFC East last season, with an underwhelming 4-13 record to show for themselves.

entry.title: Red Bull STEMx helmets stolen at Silverstone as Calum Nicholas issues CCTV warning
entry.content: Calum Nicholas has condemned the theft of custom replica helmets from Red Bull’s STEMx van at Silverstone

entry.title: "Would have ended very differently": Luck for van der Linde in horror crash
entry.content: How a matter of meters ensured that Kelvin van der Linde did not fare worse in the DTM horror crash at the Norisring: Did the BMW save him?

entry.title: Potential UCLA commit Nikola Kusturica scores 37 against Team USA
entry.content: UCLA has been rumored to Nikola Kusturica and on Sunday Kusturica scored 37 points against Team USA.

entry.title: Dodgers' Breakout Star Deserved To Be An All-Star
entry.content: Should Justin Wrobleski have made the All-Star Game?

entry.title: Florida State basketball target commits to Big Ten power
entry.content: Florida State basketball target Kevin Savage has committed to the Purdue Boilermakers over the Seminoles.

entry.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
entry.content: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

entry.title: Comcast buys the UK's biggest commercial broadcaster, ITV
entry.content: Comcast subsidiary Sky plans to buy the UK's biggest broadcaster, ITV.

entry.title: Alibaba gets a reprieve from US Chinese military ban
entry.content: A judge has ruled that the Pentagon must give Alibaba a reprieve over its placement on a Chinese military list.

entry.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
entry.content: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150M from Meituan and Tencent at a $1B valuation.

entry.title: Apple's foldable iPhone may be in short supply after it launches
entry.content: Many people who want Apple's rumored folding iPhone 'Ultra' may not be able to get it at first

entry.title: This humanoid robotics company is going public, but its CEO isn’t promising a robot in your home anytime soon
entry.content: While other humanoid startups chase sky-high valuations, Agility Robotics is betting its future on execution — and a SPAC.

entry.title: Erling Haaland cements superstar status, scores twice in Norway’s 2-1 win over Brazil
entry.content: Haaland delivered both goals as Norway defeated five-time champion Brazil and advanced to the World Cup quarterfinals for the first time in its history.

entry.title: ‘There Is No Going Back’: The Inside Story of Europe’s Rupture With America
entry.content: Trump’s tariffs, threats against Greenland spurred a rebellion by top leaders; the limits of “flattery diplomacy.”
